mods.name: Agent's BioLab
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All 11 legendary Bio Lab weapons in the Workshop - includes Sandwyrm Chainsaw

mods.name: Agents Individual Item Kits
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 2,056 individual item kits with real game icons. Single workshop tab with 21 spaced category groups. Every game item as a kit - fairly priced by complexity and rarity (5-300 credits).

mods.name: Workshop Recyclers
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Two recycling machines (Biofuel T3 + Organic T4) plus an Incinerator for instant item destruction. 5,340 recipes: 1,948 deconstruct + 335 recycle + 3,054 incinerate + 3 crafting. v5.5: Added 886 missing incinerate recipes (frozen items, ores, food, building pieces). Every item in the game now covered. Fixed icon, mesh, and tech tree.

mods.name: Dev Tools Kit
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: v1.1.3: Substituted visible meshes for 3 tools that previously used the invisible placeholder (Inspection Tool → Scanner mesh, Bug Tool → Beacon mesh, Transform Tool → Building Hammer mesh); added Debug_Target dev dummy (new 11th tool); fixed Thor's Hammer Focusable ref (Focusable_2H → Focusable_Sledge). Rearranged Workshop tree to a 4-row × 3-column grid so it fits within the vertical workshop bounds. — Unlocks 10 hidden developer tools including Thor's Hammer (fly mode), Transform Tool, Destroy Tool, Inspection Tool, Fireball, Pyromancy Flame, and more. v1.1.2: Fixed broken mesh and actionable references for current game data.

mods.name: Night Vision Goggles
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Unlocks the hidden Night Vision system built into Icarus. Craft Night Vision Goggles at Fabricator, Manufacturer, or Machining Bench. Toggle with secondary action. v2.0: Added no-decay, durability (10,000 HP), reduced weight, added Machining Bench crafting.

mods.name: Hidden Building Pieces
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Unlocks 62 hidden building pieces as individual items plus the forgotten Interior Wood Floor recipe at Fabricator/Manufacturer. Includes Wood diagonal/curved pieces, frames for 11 materials, corner stairs for 13 materials, glass stairs, and more. All items are craftable at material-appropriate benches.

mods.name: Extended Wire and Pipe Tool
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 10x range extension for all power cables and pipes. Power cables 60m, water pipes 60m, biofuel pipes 60m, crude oil pipes 100m. PAK mod - modifies Blueprint asset. All players and server must have it installed for multiplayer.

mods.name: Always Show Buildings On Map
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Always shows player-built structures on the map and minimap without requiring radar or special stats.

mods.name: Fast Processing (5x)
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 5x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Fast Processing (10x)
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 10x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Fast Processing (15x)
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 15x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Fast Processing (25x)
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing 25x faster. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Fast Processing (Instant)
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: All crafting and processing instant. 2175 recipes rebuilt from current game data. Water recipes have 500 MJ floor to prevent fluid bugs. v4.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Faster Crafting
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Halves crafting time on 2175 recipes across all workbenches. Minimum 500 MJ for water recipes. v1.4: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Turret Variants
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 15 new automated turret variants with unique firing patterns. v3.0: LOS fix PAK (turrets stop shooting through walls) + proper ammo matching (arrows, bolts, javelins, stones, biofuel). Includes Crossbow, Bow, Sniper, Assault Rifle, SMG, Javelin, Flamethrower, Rock, Minigun, Rifle, Pistol, Shotblaster, Rapid Crossbow, Storm, and Heavy Sniper turrets.

mods.name: Trap and Defense Expansion
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 23 defense recipes using real game items. Unlocks 4 elemental landmines (Poison/Burn/Shock/Freeze) previously enemy-only. Cheap early-game fortifications, traps without rare drops, and batch packs.

mods.name: Ammo Crafting Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 50 new ammo recipes. 50x batch crafting for all arrow and bullet types including special ammo. Plus 8 ammo conversion recipes.

mods.name: Armor Set Bonuses Enhanced
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Enhanced armor set bonuses with 3-piece partial bonuses for mix-and-match builds. 33 sets get a 3-piece threshold (~40% bonus) plus boosted 5-piece bonuses (+75% positive, +50% resistances).

mods.name: Exotic Economy Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Full currency exchange system with 66 recipes. Buy and sell materials with Ren, convert between exotics and currencies, cross-convert ingots, and bulk smelt ores at the correct furnaces/benches.

mods.name: Tier Upgrade Forge
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Upgrade tools and weapons to the next tier without rebuilding from scratch. 26 upgrade recipes across pickaxes, axes, knives, spears, swords, and bows.

mods.name: Waste Not
mods.author: CritFail (Updated by AgentKush)
mods.description: Mining yields useful secondary resources instead of Stone. Normal ores give bonus of the same type, dense metal ores drop Exotics. Coal gives Charcoal, Ice gives Oxite. Covers all 33 mineable deposit types.

mods.name: No Food Spoilage
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Prevents all food spoilage. 33 decayable entries + 134 composter recipes. Items decay/despawn normally but never convert to spoiled versions. v2.0: Added 134 composter recipes for raw meats, fish, dairy, vegetables, fruits, and bait.

mods.name: Extended Spoil Timers
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Extends decay timers on 33 items. Food 5x longer, other decay 3x longer. Not compatible with Hardcore Rebalance Pack.

mods.name: Indestructible Tools & Weapons
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Maximum durability on all tools, weapons, armor, buildings, doors, and crafting stations. 199 items modified to never break. v1.8: Version bump for latest game update.

mods.name: Stack Size Overhaul
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Increases stack sizes on 1,258 items. Resources/ammo/ores 5x, everything else 3x. Max cap 9999. v1.3: Added Gruel stack size (300).

mods.name: Creature Drop Enhancer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Doubles all creature butchery and skinning outputs across 62 recipes. 2x leather, bone, fur, meat, and rare drops.

mods.name: Fish and Farming Boost
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 390 changes: crops grow 2x faster across 211 growth states, harvests +50%, +2 cultivations, 57 fish spawn zones doubled, fish quality +50%.

mods.name: Modular Affliction Adjuster
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive affliction adjustment - reduces stat penalties by ~50%, extends escalation times by ~50%, and reduces damage over time by ~50%. Covers all 80+ player afflictions.

mods.name: Modular Buff Enhancer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive buff enhancement - 83 core buffs plus 156 food buffs, all boosted by ~50%. Stronger tonics, better food effects, enhanced bed healing, and more.

mods.name: Culinex Food Boost Fix
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: v2.9: Fixed remaining D_ItemsStatic reference in Raw_Chicken_Butchery input (crash fix for butcher bench). All recipe references now use D_ItemTemplate. | Fixes Culinex (Chef's Backpack) 25% food effectiveness boost to apply to all cooked foods.

mods.name: More Eye Colours
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Massive eye color expansion - 60 new colors across greens, ambers, purples, blues, greys, reds, and exotics (69 total). Plus unlocked hidden content.

mods.name: Hardcore Rebalance Pack
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: For survivors who think Icarus is too easy. v2.0: Tiered creature scaling - Forest +75% HP/+40% Melee (23), Mid-Tier +125%/+60% (37), Hard Biome +200%/+90% (42), Boss/Alpha +300%/+120% (12). Epic creatures tiered (250-500% HP). Horde waves ramp Level 30-75. Weather damage -20%, food buffs +25%. 1438 changes across 17 data tables + 2 blueprint overrides.

mods.name: Creature Difficulty Scaling
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Dynamic creature level scaling for level 500 cap. 161 spawn zones, 180 creatures, 5 scaling rules, full affliction system (poison, concussion, sprains, bee swarms, komodo bites), epic creatures with exotic loot, biome temperature modifiers, and autonomous spawns. v2.3: DarkAngel collab - adds 8 new data tables (73 entries) for afflictions, epic creatures, exotic loot, biome temps, prospect stats, and spawn zones.

mods.name: Solar Panel Expansion
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Adds all solar panels and Solar Backpack to a dedicated Solar Energy Workshop tab. Includes Solar Panel Kit, Flat Solar Panel Kit, and Solar Backpack Kit with fair pricing.

mods.name: Performance Optimizer
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Comprehensive FPS optimization - PAK config overrides (foliage/shadow/fog/LOD reduction) plus data table changes (reduced spawns, slower hordes, extended decay, boosted fuel, weather tuning). 50 new weather events + 3 weather pools added. PAK + EXMODZ required.

mods.name: Absolute Chaos - Core
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Base layer of the Absolute Chaos modpack. Overrides player Base_Stats with 76 chaos buffs (5000kg carry, 600 move speed, fall-damage immunity, zero survival drain, +900% XP and crafting) and zeros research/replication cost on all 335 workshop items. v0.2.1 drops the empty workshop tab and ships a banner.

mods.name: Bestiary Fix
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Adds missing Kill/Skin experience events for Sulfur Worm, Sulfur Vesper, Cave Worm, and Vesper to help Bestiary tracking.

mods.name: Passive Ore Extractor Drills
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 23 passive ore extractors with drill visuals. Place anywhere, connect power, load Stone. Craftable at Fabricator and Manufacturer. One per ore type including DLC ores.

mods.name: Survival Attachments
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: Adds food, oxygen, and water armor attachments. Doubles attachment slots on every armor piece (Head/Arms/Body/Legs/Feet from 1 to 2). Three new Alteration Bench recipes: Oxygen Recycler (-25% oxygen), Nutrient Dispenser (-25% food), Hydration Cell (-25% water).

mods.name: Armor Attachment Expansion
mods.author: AgentKush
mods.description: 25 new craftable armor attachments (5 per body part). Uses base-game stat keys so effects stack with talents and other attachments. Craft at Alteration Bench.
